name: Fireball
description: Hurls a ball of fire that explodes on impact dealing fire damage in an area

name: Lightning Strike
description: Emits lightning from your weapon that chains to nearby enemies

name: Frost Blink
description: Teleport to target location dealing cold damage to enemies in path

name: Ice Nova
description: Releases a ring of ice from your position damaging nearby enemies

name: Heavy Strike
description: A powerful melee attack with increased damage and stun chance

name: Arc
description: Lightning chains between enemies up to 4 times

name: Summon Skeletons
description: Summons 3-5 skeletal warriors to fight for you

name: Cyclone
description: Spin while moving forward dealing damage to enemies in path

name: Icarus Dash
description: Quick dash in target direction leaving a trail

name: Havoc Strike
description: Strikes in a cone knocking back enemies

name: Infernal Cry
description: Shout that buffs allies damage and debuffs enemy damage

name: Void Sphere
description: Creates a void sphere that damages enemies and pulls them in

name: Bone Spiral
description: Summons bones that seek enemies and impale them

name: Molten Shell
description: Creates a protective fire shield that bursts when broken

name: Arctic Armor
description: Reduces damage taken and damages attackers

name: Purifying Flames
description: Fire wave that can cleanse curses and deal damage

name: Glacial Hammer
description: Enemies hit by this attack are chilled and can be shattered

name: Lightning Warp
description: Teleport to a location dealing lightning damage to enemies in path

name: Fire Trap
description: Places a trap that explodes when triggered, laying a burning patch

name: Explosive Trap
description: Throws a trap that creates a large explosion on impact

name: Ice Spear
description: Hurls a spear of ice that pierces through enemies

name: Storm Call
description: Places a marked location that strikes after a delay

name: Raise Zombie
description: Summons a zombie to fight for you

name: Summon Golem
description: Summons a fire golem that grants life regeneration

name: Decoy Totem
description: Summons a totem that taunts nearby enemies

name: Ancestral Totem
description: Summons a totem that attacks with melee strikes

name: Vulnerability
description: Curses all enemies in an area, causing them to take increased damage

name: Enfeeble
description: Curses enemies, reducing their accuracy and damage

name: Tempest Bell
description: Ring a bell that deals lightning damage in an area

name: Shield Charge
description: Charge at enemies while holding a shield

name: Double Strike
description: Perform two rapid strikes with your weapon

name: Viper Strike
description: Strike with a venomous attack that applies poison

name: Blade Flurry
description: Release a series of attacks in rapid succession

name: Reave
description: Slash in a cone, damaging enemies in an area that grows with each use

name: Sunder
description: Slam the ground creating a shockwave that damages enemies

name: Earthquake
description: Slam the ground causing fissures that deal damage over time

name: Infernal Blow
description: Strike that causes enemies to explode in a burst of fire damage

name: Dominance
description: Aura that reduces enemy damage and resistances

name: Hatred
description: Aura that grants cold damage bonus based on physical damage

name: Anger
description: Aura that grants additional fire damage to attacks and spells

name: Wrath
description: Aura that grants additional lightning damage
